name: open-computer-use
description: Windows and macOS computer use for AI agents via Microsoft UI Automation or macOS Accessibility API

interface.shortDescription: Control logged-in desktop apps from Codex
interface.longDescription: Operate the apps you already have open. Windows uses Microsoft UI Automation through PowerShell; macOS keeps the Accessibility API and synthetic input path. Destructive typed commands and delete-like UI actions are blocked by default on Windows.
